message.content: Adversaries may exploit social media to gather information about target organizations and individuals, leveraging this data for various malicious activities. Social media platforms can reveal business announcements, employee roles, locations, and interests, which adversaries can use to craft targeted attacks. Common exploitation methods include passive data harvesting, creating fake profiles or groups to elicit sensitive information, and using gathered data for spearphishing campaigns. Notable threat actors like EXOTIC LILY, Kimsuky, and Lazarus Group have utilized social media for reconnaissance and to prepare targeted phishing attacks. Mitigation strategies include educating employees on the risks of oversharing on social media, implementing strict privacy settings, and monitoring for fake profiles or suspicious activities related to the organization.
